sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 px-4 py-8",

  container:
    "max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-6",

  header:
    "space-y-2",

  title:
    "text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold text-slate-900",

  subtitle:
    "text-xs sm:text-sm md:text-base text-slate-500",

  pathWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm sm:text-base",

  path:
    "text-gray-500 cursor-pointer transition",

  pathActive:
    "text-blue-600 font-semibold",

  pathDivider:
    "text-gray-400",

  navbar:
    "flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  searchWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-100 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg w-full lg:w-72",

  searchInput:
    "bg-transparent outline-none text-sm w-full",

  rightControls:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 w-full lg:w-auto",

  sortSelect:
    "bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none appearance-none",

  addButton:
    "inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white px-5 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition",

  submitButton:
    "bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition",

  cancelButton:
    "bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition",

  form:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  input:
    "border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-700 outline-none",

  table:
    "bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 divide-y divide-slate-100",

  row:
    "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-6 py-4 text-sm sm:text-base hover:bg-slate-50 transition",
};
